name: Appliance Failure Troubleshooting Log
description: Creates a repair-ready appliance failure log with symptoms, timing, model details, error codes, safe checks, photo evidence, warranty questions, and technician call notes.
author: Bell (design)
target_user: Homeowners, renters, household managers, and anyone preparing for an appliance repair, warranty, or landlord conversation.
trigger_keywords: what should I tell the repair technician
use_cases: Prepare evidence before calling a technician
Organize warranty or landlord repair details
Track safe checks and attempted fixes
Create service call notes and follow-up records
